from myapp.boundaries.validation import validate_email, normalize_phone
from myapp.boundaries.rate_limit import check_rate_limit
from myapp.boundaries.audit import log_action


def register_user(data):
    validate_email(data["email"])
    normalize_phone(data["phone"])
    check_rate_limit(data["user_id"])
    log_action("register", data["user_id"])
    return create_user(data)


def update_profile(user_id, data):
    if "email" in data:
        validate_email(data["email"])
    if "phone" in data:
        normalize_phone(data["phone"])
    check_rate_limit(user_id)
    log_action("update_profile", user_id)
    return save_user(user_id, data)
